output_interface: Network cable (4-pin or 5-pin), serial control cable
compatible_drones: Skydroid H16, H16 Pro, H30 controllers; agricultural drones, cargo drones, FPV platforms
price_source: Alibaba bulk pricing ($379 for 1-49 units); rc-wing.com lists $459; Amazon listing exists but price varies. Retail range approximately $379-$498 USD.
availability: Widely available through Alibaba, Amazon, rc-wing.com, arrishobby.com, eBay, and various drone parts retailers
notable_features: Designed for police surveillance, power line inspection, search and rescue
research_notes: Skydroid is based in Quanzhou, China and primarily makes RC controllers and accessories. The C20 weight is listed as 1.000 kg gross weight on Alibaba (this likely includes packaging; net weight may be lower but could not be confirmed from available sources). At 1000g gross weight, it is borderline for the under-1000g criteria -- the net weight of the gimbal itself may be under 1000g. The zoom is inconsistently listed as 22x and 23x across different sources. Night vision capability comes from a dual-sensor setup with an illumination spotlight rather than true infrared thermal imaging. The C20 is designed to work within the Skydroid ecosystem (H16/H30 controllers). It is marked as meets_criteria=true based on 22x+ optical zoom, likely under 1000g net weight, and price well under $10,000 ($379-$498). However, the weight criterion is marginal if gross weight equals net weight.
